task: Plan a small automated research run inspired by AI Scientist-v2 for a new PaperToSkill idea while preserving core workflow constraints and limitations.
user_prompt: Given a new research idea, produce an agent run plan that follows the AI Scientist-v2 method closely enough to be executable in a small local harness. The plan must include stages, node lifecycle, debug/refine policy, replication/aggregation, visual review, and limits/ethics.

required_capabilities.description: Plan begins from generalized idea generation rather than a fixed code template.
Plan includes the four experiment-manager stages.
Plan distinguishes debugging buggy nodes from refining non-buggy nodes.
Plan includes replication and aggregation for robust results.
Plan includes figure generation and VLM or visual review of plots.
Plan preserves limitations and ethical constraints from the paper.
Context includes source anchors or equivalent traceability.
